unit_test_failures.root_cause: React.act is not a function — @testing-library/react@16.3.2 uses react-dom/test-utils which removed act export in React 19

smoke_spec.assertion_depth: page load + body visible + auth gate redirect + SEO title/meta + font-serif

auth_spec.assertion_depth: login flow, session restore, role-based redirect, wrong password error

routes_spec.routes_covered: 47 routes from routeTable — all anonymous crawl
routes_spec.assertion_depth: no crash, no console errors, no page errors, no 'Configuration Required' text

ai_flow_spec.assertion_depth: AI plan wizard steps, Analyze Menu button, success/failure surface

recommended_wos: TEST-01: Fix @testing-library/react React 19 compat — upgrade to v17+ (unblocks 29 failing unit tests)
TEST-02: Auth flow tests — ResetPassword token validation, Signup user creation, session persistence
TEST-03: Payment flow tests — CreditPurchase, SubscriptionManagement, Checkout (Stripe mock)
TEST-04: RLS boundary tests — ContactDetail, DealDetail, AdminUsers (verify role enforcement)
TEST-05: AI safety tests — AIAdvisor guardrails, credit deduction on action, error states
TEST-06: E2E routeTable expansion — add 200+ missing routes to crawl coverage

launch_gate_status.requirement_22: ≥10 E2E Playwright tests — CURRENT: 47-route crawl + smoke + auth (~20+ tests) ✅
launch_gate_status.blocker: 29 unit tests FAILING due to React.act compat — must fix before launch
